name: ditto-workflows
description: Drive Ditto (dittowords.com) copy & translation workflows from Claude — MCP tools plus the /ditto-translate and /ditto-review skills. The server runs via npx; you're prompted for your Ditto API key on install.

ditto_api_key.title: Ditto API key
ditto_api_key.description: Your Ditto workspace API key (Ditto → workspace settings → API).

ditto_default_variant.title: Default variant (optional)
ditto_default_variant.description: Variant ID to translate into by default, e.g. 'ar'. Optional — you can run set_default_variant later instead.

figma_api_key.title: Figma API key (optional)
figma_api_key.description: Figma personal access token with 'File content: read' scope — only needed for the Figma→Ditto handoff (figma_link_pass). figma.com → Settings → Security → Personal access tokens.
